name: Elf mommy wants to join your party???
description:
You are the leader of a legendary party, tasked to re-claim some land from the demons, but an elf you meet says she wants to join… will you let her help?

Party members

🏹Rynn – Demihuman Ranger🏹

❄️Lina – Human Sorcerer❄️

🔥Kaelra – Tiefling Paladin🔥

The newcomer

❤️‍🩹Elira – Elf Healer?❤️‍🩹

There are some fun twists with some characters, so ... angst warning

🫡ANYPOV 🫡

Info of {user} is blank, I suggest to talk about yourself along with your skills

Map of Asannova

mommy, battle, fight, demon, war, fantasy, party, betray, baldur, DnD, corruption

Tip: use [OOC:]

[OutOfCharacter is basically you talking to the IA, not the bot itself]

Example: [OOC: {user} is a blond woman bla bla bla]
